title: Wyoming Wants To Make Its Five-Year Federal Rural Health Funding Last ‘Forever’
summary: State officials believe they’ve found a way to extend the life of federal Rural Health Transformation Program money Wyoming is receiving as part of last summer’s One Big Beautiful Bill Act — by investing most of it.

title: Red and Blue States Alike Want To Limit AI in Insurance. Trump Wants To Limit the States.
summary: A revolt is afoot in both red and blue states against the use of artificial intelligence in health insurance determinations — and against efforts led by President Donald Trump to tie states’ hands.

title: Listen to the Latest ‘KFF Health News Minute’
summary: The "KFF Health News Minute” brings original health care and health policy reporting from our newsroom to the airwaves each week.

title: La respuesta del equipo de Trump a los aumentos de las primas de ACA: cobertura catastrófica
summary: La cobertura médica y su accesibilidad se han convertido en temas políticamente sensibles de cara a las elecciones de medio término de noviembre.

title: Trump Required Hospitals To Post Their Prices for Patients. Mostly It’s the Industry Using the Data.
summary: Politicians have pushed for price transparency in health care. But instead of patients shopping for services, it’s mostly health systems and insurers that are using the information, as fodder for negotiations over pay.

title: Listen: Why Do I Need Prior Authorization?
summary: When the doctor says you need a prescription or treatment, sometimes you need approval from your health insurance first. Without it, they won’t pay. Health reporter Sarah Boden joins “Life Kit” host Marielle Segarra to discuss prior authorization.

title: Nuevas reglas de trabajo de Medicaid podrían impactar más fuerte en adultos de mediana edad
summary: Los adultos de entre 50 y 64 años, especialmente las mujeres, son quienes probablemente resulten más afectados por las nuevas reglas que imponen trabajar para acceder al programa de salud.

title: El polémico plan de Alabama: usar robots para atención materna en zonas rurales
summary: En 2024, el año más reciente con datos disponibles, la tasa de mortalidad infantil en Alabama fue de 7,1 muertes por cada 1.000 partos con recién nacidos vivos.

title: Journalists Unpack Impact of ICE Arrests on Families and Caffeine’s Effect on Dementia Risk
summary: KFF Health News journalists made the rounds on national or local media recently to discuss topical stories. Here’s a collection of their appearances.

title: ACA Subsidies Expired. Open Enrollment Ended. But It Will Still Take Awhile To Register the Results.
summary: Get our weekly newsletter, The Week in Brief, featuring a roundup of our original coverage, Fridays at 2 p.m. ET.
